scenarios.desc: Step 0 PASS triggers Step 0.5 before Step 1
scenarios.input: Invoke /spec in auto mode. Step 0 has already PASSed with Q1=Maintainer, Q2=Manual D-checks remain, Q3=.claude/commands/spec.md, Q4=Promote LLM-required D-checks to eval harness, Q5=Review deferred QA F1, Q6=Future /spec PRs should be gated. No Step 0 halt conditions apply. Determine the next action before asking any Step 1 clarification questions.
scenarios.rationale: AC-01 is behavioral: Step 0.5 must run only after Step 0 PASS and before Step 1, then append a pass tally if no halt fires.

scenarios.desc: Forgetful unavailable degrades to Serena-only and completes
scenarios.input: Invoke /spec after Step 0 PASS. During Step 0.5, Forgetful MCP is unavailable. Serena memory search is available and returns one relevant prior-art entry. chestertons-fence and exploring-knowledge-graph are available. No halt trigger fires. Determine the Step 0.5 outcome and the required record in PriorArtBlock/Coverage notes.
scenarios.rationale: AC-07 requires graceful degradation: log the Forgetful outage in coverage notes, run Serena-only search, complete Step 0.5, and append a pass tally.

scenarios.desc: Graph traversal discovers an entity requiring proposer adjudication
scenarios.input: Invoke /spec after Step 0 PASS. Step 0 Q1+Q3+Q4 mention maintainer, .claude/commands/spec.md, and ADR-057. exploring-knowledge-graph discovers connected entity ADR-060, which is absent from Q1, Q3, and Q4 after normalization. No prior adjudication exists. Determine the required next action.
scenarios.rationale: AC-08 requires each newly discovered entity absent from Q1+Q3+Q4 to be presented for in-scope/out-of-scope/blast-radius adjudication.

scenarios.desc: One blast-radius entity does not halt in auto mode
scenarios.input: Invoke /spec in auto mode after Step 0 PASS. Step 0.5 discovers three entities. The proposer adjudicates one as blast-radius and the others as in-scope. No H6-H10 trigger fires. Determine whether Step 0.5 halts or proceeds.
scenarios.rationale: AC-09 only halts when blast-radius count reaches the mode threshold; auto mode requires 3, so one blast-radius entity proceeds and appends a pass tally.

scenarios.desc: Step 9 check 9d passes when PriorArtBlock is populated
scenarios.input: Run Step 9 critic on a PRD containing ## Prior Art / Constraints with a non-empty ### Direct prior art from memory subsection citing ADR-057 and a non-empty ### Coverage notes subsection. Checks 9a, 9b, and 9c pass. Determine the Check 9d verdict.
scenarios.rationale: AC-12 pass condition is a populated PriorArtBlock with at least one evidence subsection or justified coverage note.

scenarios.desc: Step 9 check 9d fails when PriorArtBlock is removed
scenarios.input: Run Step 9 critic on a PRD where the ## Prior Art / Constraints section has been manually removed. Checks 9a, 9b, and 9c pass. Determine the Check 9d verdict and whether the critic may return APPROVED.
scenarios.rationale: AC-12 fail condition is absence of PriorArtBlock; Step 9 must emit a blocking finding and cannot approve while 9d fails.

scenarios.desc: Tier upgrade from 3 to 4 triggers supplemental Phase 5 traversal
scenarios.input: Invoke /spec after Step 0.5 computed ProvisionalTier=3 from Q4='3 days' and entity_count=3, so Phases 1-4 already ran. Later Step 3 classifies actual tier as 4. Existing PriorArtBlock has all three original subsections populated. Determine the required supplemental traversal behavior.
scenarios.rationale: AC-10 requires supplemental traversal when actual_tier > provisional_tier and the actual tier needs more phases, preserving original PriorArtBlock subsections.
